title: Hiring Store Manager at ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Lucknow team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions:
ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions!
